caption: The video appears to be a news segment featuring an interview with Jiveesh Mishra, a member of the BJP from Bihar. He is seated inside a car, wearing a white shirt and a maroon vest, and is being interviewed by a reporter holding a microphone with the ANI logo. The background includes other individuals who seem to be part of the entourage or security. The text on the screen indicates that the Congress party is under pressure, and Tejashwi's 'picture' remains pending. The lower third of the screen displays additional information, including the names of other political figures such as Nitesh Kumar and Sumit Kumar, suggesting that the discussion might involve political developments or statements related to these individuals. The timestamp shows it is 10:04 PM, indicating that this is likely an evening news broadcast.
